Use this section for review explanations, discussion points, or todos. A clear and concise description of the PR. Include the following if applicable:

- Summary of changes
- Reasoning
- Additional context

This PR is a: [New feature, Bug fix, Refactor, Performance improvement, something else]

## Screenshots

Screenshots or a screen recording of visual changes associated with this PR. You can remove this section for non-visual changes.

## Hints

If the PR requires special steps to run or test, describe them here. Only include this section if the change is non-trivial or requires additional context.

## Breaking

If this PR introduces a breaking change, please explicitly mention it here. While reviewers should be able to detect this from the code, calling it out helps ensure nothing is missed.
